name: is.zori.entities.physics2d
description: DOTS 2D physics: built-in Rigidbody2D/Collider2D authoring baked to ECS, stepped over the low-level 2D physics (Box2D) batch surface, with each body's pose written into Unity.Transforms.LocalToWorld. Renderer-agnostic.

samples.description: Spray-spawns quads with box colliders, rendered with Unity.Entities.Graphics off the package's LocalToWorld write-back, to measure cached-template creation cost (optimisation on/off via PhysicsStep2DAuthoring, threshold sweep). The sample asmdef references Unity.Entities.Graphics; the package itself stays renderer-agnostic, so importing this sample requires adding com.unity.entities.graphics to the project manifest.
